violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauces, vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

Various prepared foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
Various food products were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
Single use items are being used for food preparation and storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement and front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
The thermometer in the refrigerator in the front area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the display case have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The condensate from the display case refrigeration unit is draining into a container in the basement. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The door in the walk-in freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items, especially recycleable containers were observed in the area near the kitchen door, and in the basement. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The floors especially beneath the rolling bins stored below the food prep counter have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
